Meta Platforms Inc. will be the first major customer for the company?™s chip, called an AGI CPU, Arm said Tuesday at an event in San Francisco. news.headline: Constellation Energy Taps NVIDIA AI Factories As Power Market Role Grows
news.summary: NVIDIA has partnered with Constellation Energy (NasdaqGS:CEG) and several large U.S. utilities to supply power for AI data center "factories". The collaboration focuses on tying flexible, grid aware compute workloads to real time grid conditions. This arrangement connects AI power demand directly with Constellation's generation and grid management capabilities.
